packages.title: Maldives Honeymoon
packages.overview: The ultimate romantic escape — the Maldives is nature's own paradise for honeymooners. Stay in a stunning overwater bungalow with direct lagoon access, dine under the stars, snorkel through vibrant coral reefs, and drift into each other's arms on a private sunset cruise. This is romance at its most breathtaking.
highlights: Overwater bungalow with private sun deck & direct ocean access
Couples' spa ritual with traditional Maldivian techniques
Private sunset dhoni cruise with champagne
House reef snorkeling with manta rays & turtles
Romantic candlelight dinner on a sandbank

itinerary.title: Arrive Male & Transfer
activities: Welcome with flower garlands & room tour, beach sunset

itinerary.title: Lagoon & Spa
activities: Couples' spa: 90-min traditional massage & flower bath
Evening sunset dhoni cruise with champagne & canapés

itinerary.title: Snorkeling & Marine Life
activities: Guided snorkeling on vibrant house reef
Glass-bottom kayaking to see coral & fish
Private candlelight sandbank dinner under the stars

itinerary.title: Island Exploration
activities: Visit local Maldivian island & fishing village

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Departure with hearts full of love

packages.title: Bali Romance
packages.overview: Bali weaves magic for couples with its emerald rice terraces, ancient Hindu temples, and world-class spas. From the cultural heart of Ubud to the romantic sunsets of Seminyak, this 6-day honeymoon immerses you in Bali's unique blend of spirituality, beauty, and indulgence — all crafted just for two.
highlights: Private Balinese blessing ceremony for couples
Sunrise trek to Mount Batur volcano
Tegallalang rice terrace photo walk
Romantic dinner cruise along Jimbaran Bay
Couples' floral bath at luxury spa

itinerary.title: Arrive Bali
activities: Airport pickup & resort check-in in Seminyak
Seminyak beach sunset at Ku De Ta

itinerary.title: Ubud – Culture & Nature
activities: Traditional Balinese cooking class for two

itinerary.title: Mount Batur Sunrise
activities: Pre-dawn drive & sunrise hike to Mount Batur
Afternoon Ubud spa: couples' floral bath & massage

itinerary.title: Temples & Blessing
activities: Uluwatu cliff temple & Kecak fire dance
Private Balinese blessing ceremony for couples

itinerary.title: Leisure & Dinner Cruise
activities: Jimbaran Bay seafood dinner cruise with live music

packages.title: Kashmir Dreams
packages.overview: Kashmir — where heaven meets earth. Spend your honeymoon gliding across the legendary Dal Lake in a traditional shikara, staying in a luxurious wooden houseboat, and strolling through meadows of wildflowers in Pahalgam. With snow-capped peaks as your backdrop, Kashmir is a fairy-tale honeymoon come true.
highlights: Houseboat stay on Dal Lake with personal shikara service
Gondola (ropeway) ride to Kongdori — Himalayan views
Betaab Valley picnic in Pahalgam
Shalimar Bagh Mughal garden sunset stroll
Gulmarg snowfield visit & skiing/snow activities

itinerary.title: Arrive Srinagar
activities: Airport pickup & transfer to houseboat on Dal Lake
Welcome shikara ride with flower garlands

itinerary.title: Dal Lake & Mughal Gardens
activities: Morning shikara market tour on Dal Lake
Shalimar Bagh & Nishat Bagh Mughal Gardens

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Snow Adventure
activities: Snow activities: skiing or snowball play

itinerary.title: Pahalgam – Valley of Shepherds
activities: Aru Valley horse ride for couples

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
activities: Last shikara ride on Dal Lake

packages.title: Europe Romance
packages.overview: Three of Europe's most romantic cities — Paris, Venice, and Vienna — united in one extraordinary honeymoon journey. Walk Paris's cobblestone streets hand in hand, drift through Venice's canals by private gondola, and waltz through Vienna's imperial palaces. A 8-day love story set across Europe's most enchanting backdrops.
highlights: Private gondola serenade in Venice's canals
Eiffel Tower champagne toast at sunset
Vienna State Opera gala evening
Truffle dinner at a Paris bistro
Day trip to Hallstatt fairy-tale village from Vienna

itinerary.title: Arrive Paris
activities: Evening Seine River cruise at twilight

itinerary.title: Paris – City of Love
activities: Eiffel Tower with champagne at summit

itinerary.title: Versailles & Departure
activities: Palace of Versailles & Marie Antoinette's garden
Truffle dinner at classic Parisian brasserie

itinerary.title: Arrive Venice
activities: Arrive Venice, water taxi to hotel on Grand Canal
Private gondola serenade through hidden canals
Rialto market evening & prosecco at a bacaro

itinerary.title: Venice – La Serenissima
activities: St. Mark's Basilica & Doge's Palace tour

itinerary.title: Venice to Vienna
activities: Vienna hotel check-in & evening walk along the Ring

itinerary.title: Vienna – Imperial Romance
activities: Wine tasting at a classic Viennese Heurigen

packages.title: Kerala Backwaters
packages.overview: Kerala's backwaters are a paradise of tranquility — a labyrinth of palm-fringed canals, shimmering lakes, and lush paddy fields. Drift through this serene waterworld on your private houseboat, indulge in Ayurveda treatments, and wake up to the sounds of birds on mirror-still water. Romance in its most gentle form.
highlights: Private houseboat on Vembanad Lake
Ayurveda couples' treatment at a lakeside spa
Kathakali classical dance performance in Kochi
Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary morning walk
Sunset canoe ride through village canals

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
activities: Fort Kochi heritage walk: Chinese fishing nets, Dutch Palace

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat
activities: Drive to Alleppey & board luxury houseboat
Backwater cruise through paddy fields & villages
Overnight on houseboat with fresh Kerala meals

itinerary.title: Kumarakom – Lakeside Bliss
activities: Morning bird watching at Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary
Sunset canoe ride through narrow village canals

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Departure — carrying Kerala's calm in your hearts

packages.title: Seychelles Paradise
packages.overview: The Seychelles archipelago is one of the world's last true tropical paradises — granite boulders, turquoise lagoons, and pristine coral reefs set against skies of impossible blue. Hop between the islands of Praslin and La Digue, discovering secluded beaches, rare endemic wildlife, and luxurious island intimacy built for two.
highlights: Anse Source d'Argent — world's most photographed beach
Vallée de Mai Nature Reserve & coco de mer palms
Couple's sunset sail with dolphins
Private snorkeling at Anse Lazio coral reef
Creole cooking class for two

itinerary.title: Arrive Mahé, Transfer to Praslin
activities: Beach resort check-in & welcome cocktails at sunset

itinerary.title: Praslin – Nature & Beach
activities: Vallée de Mai UNESCO reserve: coco de mer forest
Anse Lazio beach: snorkeling the coral reef

itinerary.title: La Digue Exploration
activities: Kayak to hidden Grand Anse beach
Snorkeling at Petite Anse with marine turtles
Sunset sail with dolphin spotting & champagne

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Ferry to Mahé for international flight
